<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ribociclib Succinate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Early breast cancerKisqali in combination with an aromatase inhibitor is indicated for the adjuvant treatment of patients with hormone receptor (HR)-positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>myeloid leukemia（99.3%）</li>
<li>thrombocytopenia（99.3%）</li>
<li>marcothrombocytopenia with mitral valve insufficiency（99.1%）</li>
<li>hereditary thrombocytopenia with normal platelets（99.1%）</li>
<li>transient neonatal thrombocytopenia（99.0%）</li>
<li>dense granule disease（98.9%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（98.5%）</li>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（98.1%）</li>
<li>HIV infectious disease（98.1%）</li>
<li>heart neoplasm（98.1%）</li>
<li>platelet storage pool deficiency（97.9%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（97.7%）</li>
<li>collagenopathy（97.7%）</li>
<li>lymphocytic hypereosinophilic syndrome（97.7%）</li>
<li>cardiovascular disease（97.6%）</li>
<li>heart valve disease（97.6%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（97.5%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（97.5%）</li>
<li>heart conduction disease（97.5%）</li>
<li>melanoma（97.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
